mapper.select: SELECT t.TERMS_NM AS "termsNm", t.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM AS "termsEngAbrvNm", t.DOMAIN_NM AS "domainNm" FROM TB_TERMS_WORDS tw JOIN TB_TERMS t ON tw.TERMS_ID = t.TERMS_ID WHERE tw.WORD_ID = #{wordId} ORDER BY t.TERMS_NM

SELECT a.OBJ_NM AS "objNm", a.ATTR_NM AS "attrNm", a.ATTR_NM_KR AS "attrNmKr", m.DM_NM AS "dataModelNm" FROM TB_DATA_MODEL_ATTR a JOIN TB_DATA_MODEL m ON a.DM_ID = m.DM_ID WHERE a.DM_CLCT_ID IN ( SELECT c.DM_CLCT_ID FROM TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT c WHERE c.CLCT_END_DT = ( SELECT MAX(c2.CLCT_END_DT) FROM TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT c2 WHERE c2.DM_ID = c.DM_ID ) ) AND a.ATTR_NM ILIKE '%' || ( SELECT w.WORD_ENG_ABRV_NM FROM TB_WORD w WHERE w.WORD_ID = #{wordId} ) || '%' ORDER BY m.DM_NM, a.OBJ_NM, a.ATTR_NM
SELECT t.TERMS_NM AS "termsNm", t.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM AS "termsEngAbrvNm" FROM TB_TERMS t WHERE t.DOMAIN_NM = #{domainNm} ORDER BY t.TERMS_NM
